homepage.title: Adhesive Application Systems for the Industry | Robatech
homepage.description: Optimize your industrial adhesive application for hot melt adhesive and cold glue with adhesive application solutions from Robatech.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Adhesive Application Systems for the Industry | Robatech
YOU GLUE. WE CARE.
When every second counts, the best service matters.
We take responsibility – with innovative systems and a team that takes action when needed.
Live at interpack.
LET’S GO!
CONNECTING THE FUTURE
Thank you for 50 years of Robatech! Together, we have built strong bonds based on trust, innovation, and reliability. And together, we are shaping the future.
CELEBRATE WITH US
It’s time for Generation Alpha.
Discover the powerful all-rounder among melters. Reliable adhesive application for your success.
Learn more
adhesive application systems from robatech
We optimize gluing processes - you enjoy the added value. Take advantage of our decades of experience and the wide product range to find the best solution for your adhesive application.
SOLUTIONS FOR INDUSTRIAL ADHESIVE APPLICATION
Find out here how you can glue your products efficiently and sustainably with our adhesive application systems for hot-melt adhesive and cold glue.
APPLICATIONS
Adhesive application solutions for different gluing processes
READ MORE
PRODUCTS
Products for hot melt adhesive and PUR as well as cold glue application
READ MORE
INDUSTRIES
Adhesive application systems for specific sectors of industry
READ MORE
NEWSROOM
What's going on at Robatech? At which trade fairs and events can you meet us in person or virtually? This and many interesting articles on industrial adhesive application can be found in the Robatech Newsroom.
Explore
20. April 2026
From tape to hot melt adhesive: Fatra automates carton sealing
A new packaging line for LVT flooring replaces manual steps and seals shipping cartons quickly and reliably using Robatech adhesive technology.
Explore
31. March 2026
New: precise cold glue spray application with Polaris
User-friendly spray head for economical and process-reliable gluing in paper wrapping or robot-assisted applications.
Explore
16. March 2026
Interpack 2026: You glue. We care.
We take responsibility for your entire gluing process – so that your line keeps running.
OUR CUSTOMERS ABOUT ROBATECH
What makes our customers satisfied? The answer varies, because Robatech adhesive application systems are versatile and the solutions are individually tailored.
“Trust is the most important thing in a collaboration. And that is based on the experiences one has had with each other. In our 25 years of working together, Robatech has proven time and again that they are reliable and deliver outstanding quality.“
Martin Hammerschmid
Managing Director

contact_page.text:
Haben Sie Fragen? Kontaktieren Sie uns! Robatech
KONTAKTIEREN SIE UNS – TECHNISCHER SUPPORT & ALLGEMEINE FRAGEN
Unser Team steht Ihnen weltweit zur Seite: für alle technischen Belange und für Beratung zum industriellen Klebstoffauftrag.
TECHNISCHER SUPPORT IN IHREM LAND
Sie haben einen technischen Notfall und möchten das Robatech-Serviceteam kontaktieren? Die Kontaktdaten Ihres Landes finden Sie auf der Standort-Seite.
SIE HABEN FRAGEN ZUM KLEBSTOFFAUFTRAG?
Nutzen Sie das Kontaktformular, um Ihre Fragen zu einem Produkt oder zum Klebstoffauftrag in einer spezifischen Anwendung zu stellen. Unsere Experten melden sich bei Ihnen. Wir freuen uns über Ihre Nachricht.
HABEN SIE FRAGEN AN IHREN LOKALEN ROBATECH-ANSPRECHPARTNER?
Sie können Ihren lokalen Ansprechpartner direkt kontaktieren. Die Telefonnummer und E-Mail-Adresse finden Sie auf der Standort-Seite.
Fragen?
